actions.value:
Hi,
thanks for reaching out.

Edge is a zero-knowledge app and we don't have access to the information you share with our exchange partners, but if you tell us which service inside Edge you used (Simplex, Banxa, Moonpay, Kado, Paybis, Bity, Bits of Gold...) and provide an order ID we can try to check the status of the order or give you the provider contact info, so you can get the fastest support possible.
